composites.title: Lakeside Reverie at Plitvice in Autumn
composites.prompt: A young solo female model with long blonde hair and Korean facial features is seated sideways on a rustic wooden chair at the edge of one of Plitvice Lakes iconic wooden walkways, Croatia, during peak autumn. One leg is elegantly crossed, she leans back with one hand resting near a small espresso cup placed on the weathered railing, the other hand lightly touching her hair, her gaze drifting dreamily toward the cascading turquoise waterfalls beyond. She wears a navy and white Breton stripe top, high-waisted wide-leg cream trousers, a red silk neck scarf, and nude ballet flats. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, cinematic editorial style.

composites.title: Cherry Blossom Parisian Reverie
composites.prompt: Photorealistic editorial fashion photograph. A young woman with long blonde hair and Korean facial features is seated sideways on a delicate white bistro chair beneath a breathtaking tunnel of cherry blossom trees in full bloom, Japan. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, cinematic Vogue editorial style, 16:9 aspect ratio.

composites.title: Salar de Uyuni Sunrise Bolivia
composites.prompt: Aerial view of Salar de Uyuni salt flat at sunrise in Bolivia, perfect mirror reflection of dramatic pink and orange sky, endless white crystalline salt crust stretching to the horizon, small cactus islands emerging from the reflective surface, golden light rays breaking through clouds, ultra-wide landscape photography, photorealistic, 8K

composites.title: Zhangjiajie Pillar Mountains Sunrise China
composites.prompt: Dramatic sunrise over the towering sandstone pillar formations of Zhangjiajie National Forest Park, China — ethereal mist clinging to the jun green peaks, golden light breaking through mountain clouds, dramatic inspiration for the Avatar 2009 film, extreme vertical cliffs and lash forest topped pinnacles, drone photography, ultra-wide, photorealistic, 8K

composites.title: Salar de Uyuni Sunrise Parisian Reverie Composite
composites.prompt: An ultra-sharp, dreamlike golden hour photograph of a strikingly beautiful young woman with long blonde hair seated gracefully at a bistro table set directly on the crystalline mirror-surface of the Salar de Uyuni salt flat at sunrise in Bolivia. The endless white salt crust stretches to the horizon, perfectly reflecting the dramatic pink and orange sunrise sky above. Small cactus islands emerge from the reflective surface in the background. The woman sits sideways on a vintage rattan bistro chair, one leg elegantly crossed, leaning back with effortless poise — one hand resting near a delicate espresso cup on the marble-top table, the other hand lightly touching her flowing blonde hair. She wears a navy and white Breton stripe top, high-waisted wide-leg cream trousers, a red silk neck scarf, nude ballet flats, and carries a small structured tan leather crossbody bag. Her gaze drifts dreamily toward the vast salt horizon. Golden light rays break through dramatic clouds above, casting warm cinematic light across both the woman and the surreal landscape. Photorealistic, wide-angle, 85mm, golden hour, stunning, dramatic, vivid colors, high-resolution editorial fashion photography.
composites.description: A dreamlike golden hour composite placing an elegantly dressed Parisian woman at a bistro table on the mirror-like surface of Bolivia's Salar de Uyuni salt flat, where the sunrise sky reflects perfectly across the endless crystalline plains.

poses.title: Cobblestone Street Vintage Coat Umbrella Twirl
poses.description: A young blonde Korean model on a rain-slicked cobblestone European street at dusk, wearing a vintage camel-colored wool coat, twirling a classic black umbrella over her shoulder, glancing back with a playful smile. Soft bokeh city lights glow in the background.
